chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-977 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.3604/2023 22-08-2023 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant contempt application, which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
